_doc: W2 eval baseline. Rates are last-known-good on main. The CI gate compares the PR's pass rates against this; any category regressing by more than --regression-delta (default 5%) or dropping below --floor (default 90%) fails the build. Refresh by running `python -m evals.w2.runner --save-baseline evals/w2/baseline.json` on main after a known-good merge.
